title: After-Action Report — Tiered league + Youth league + IPL auction
scope: This session built three structural additions to O27 in one branch: 1. A new league structure — 4-tier promotion/relegation (Galactic / Premier / National / Association), 14 teams per tier, 80 games per team. 2. The O27 Youth League — 32 national teams of ages 14–19, auto-attached to every save. 3. An IPL-style auction with Vickrey resolution — runs at season rollover for tiered configs, redistributes every non-keeper player to the highest valuer.

rationale.item: The user's first proposal was "play every adjacent tier" — that arrangement is mathematically inconsistent with 80 games for everyone; the only configuration that lands at exactly 80 games for all 56 teams with symmetric per-pair counts is paired tiers.

The Phase 3 youth-sim commit shipped with jokers_available=[] and mgr_joker_aggression=0.0. Reviewer correctly pointed out that this isn't O27. Jokers are structural — README.md:19 lists them as a load-bearing rule of the sport, and README.md:68 describes joker deployment as the reason intentional walks are rare in O27.

Why Vickrey: no need to model bidding rounds — a single private bid per player resolves cleanly to a winner; and honest "second-best willing to pay X" log entries — with Vickrey the bid isn't gameable, so the numbers are interpretable as actual valuations.

Mirroring game_batter_stats / game_pitcher_stats for youth would have at least doubled the schema surface for marginal narrative gain. The development engine — which is the substance of the youth feature — does not depend on per-game youth stats.

Separate youth tables instead of is_youth flags: the Flask app has 50+ queries against teams/players/games; adding a flag would have required threading WHERE is_youth = 0 through every leaderboard; schema differences are real; graduation is a clean schema-to-schema insert.
Per the user's design ask: youth ratings should work like US college recruiting stars (★ to ★★★★★) and the underlying numbers should stay hidden.

delegation_events.decision: Relegation playoff implemented as a Bernoulli draw rather than real game sim, scoped down per user priority
delegation_events.quote: That's deliberate: the playoff happens at off-season time when the engine isn't running, and the user explicitly said the auction part isn't important right now (so the playoff infrastructure shouldn't be either).
The user opted out of stratified talent at seed time, so the inaugural Galactic isn't actually better than Association on day 1.
The user mentioned rivalries in the abstract but didn't ask for them — the schedule doesn't designate any specific cross-tier teams as recurring rivals.

delegation_events.decision: Hide numerical attribute grades behind recruiting stars
delegation_events.quote: Per the user's design ask: youth ratings should work like US college recruiting stars (★ to ★★★★★) and the underlying numbers should stay hidden.

delegation_events.decision: Use a 9-batter lineup for youth instead of padding with pitcher-DHs
delegation_events.quote: Use a 9-batter lineup matching the original O27 README rules (8 fielders + SP, all 9 fielders bat). … This was the path taken.

actions.description: New tiered 56-team config with schedule_mode tiered, tier_order, tier_schedule_pairs, promotion_relegation block, auction block
New _generate_tiered_pairings() in schedule generation, routed via schedule_mode == "tiered" check
New _assign_tiered_divisions() dealing teams into tiers via random shuffle; seed_league() routes through it; also auto-attaches youth league (attach_youth_league flag)
New promotion module: apply_promotion_relegation(config, *, rng_seed, dry_run) computing and applying moves, returning structured report

Standings/new-league UI for tiers (badges, seed numbers, coloured promotion/relegation gutters, Preview/Run P/R buttons), new POST /api/season/promote-relegate, /api/season/advance now calls apply_promotion_relegation

Youth league module: schema (youth_teams, youth_players, youth_groups, youth_group_membership, youth_games), seeder, advance_youth_year, run_youth_tournament, reset_youth_tournament, get_tournament, read helpers
Youth web routes and templates: /youth, /youth/team/<id>, /youth/tournament, POST /api/youth/seed, POST /api/youth/tournament/run

IPL-style auction module with Vickrey resolution: schema (auction_keepers, auction_results), _select_keepers, _team_bid, apply_auction, get_auction (~370 lines); /auction route + POST /api/auction/run; auction.html template; nav link
Phase 3: real PA-by-PA engine sim for youth tournament via new youth_sim module, game_youth_batter_stats / game_youth_pitcher_stats tables, /youth/game/<id> box score route + template

Phase 4: 28-player youth rosters with jokers, Youth Potential Index governor, sticky recruiting stars, hidden ratings; schema ALTERs (is_joker, joker_archetype, youth_potential_index, recruit_stars); UI reworked to stars + observed stats

risk_posture: The MLB-shape `_generate_pairings()` is unchanged — every other config still flows through it.
30teams config is unchanged — the new code paths are only entered when `schedule_mode == "tiered"`.

No existing config was touched. No existing route was removed or re-shaped. Every code path that pre-dated this branch flows through unchanged when the active config is non-tiered, and the youth league is fully separate-schema.
The heuristic is kept as a per-game fallback wrapped in try/except so a single engine bug doesn't brick the whole tournament.
This was the simplest defensible cut for the demo.

validation_claims.claim: 2240 games scheduled for 56 teams; every team at exactly 80.
validation_claims.check_method: Seed the 56teams_tiered config and count scheduled games per team

validation_claims.claim: 364 in-tier games per tier, 392 cross-tier games on each scheduled edge, 0 on the unscheduled P–N edge.
validation_claims.check_method: Query games table by tier pairing after seeding

validation_claims.claim: 12 moves on every dry-run (2 per tier-edge × 3 edges × 2 sides); after apply, every tier still has exactly 14 teams; dry-run does not mutate teams.league
validation_claims.check_method: Run apply_promotion_relegation dry_run and apply on a seeded DB and inspect

validation_claims.claim: 32 teams seeded, 384 youth players total, age range 14..19; one rollover produced 66 graduations → 66 new FAs at 20 → 66 new 14-year-olds backfilled
validation_claims.check_method: Seed and roll over a save; count youth_players and pro FA inserts

validation_claims.claim: 63 games per tournament: 48 group + 15 knockout. R16 contains exactly 16 distinct teams. One champion.
validation_claims.check_method: Run run_youth_tournament and count youth_games rows by round
Start the app and request the routes

validation_claims.claim: 168 keepers retained (56 × 3); 2464-player pool → 1736 sold, 728 unsold; top sale ~$594 for grade-70 talent; Vickrey gap visible in the log
validation_claims.check_method: Run apply_auction on the tiered config and inspect auction_results

validation_claims.claim: /auction renders all sections; non-tiered config shows the "tiered-only" message instead of erroring
validation_claims.check_method: Request /auction under tiered and non-tiered saves

validation_claims.claim: In the calibration sim, jokers produced 1262 PAs across the 63-game tournament
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run a youth tournament and count joker PAs

validation_claims.claim: Empirically every team passed the shape audit post-rollover (28 total, 9 pitchers, 3 jokers per team, all three joker archetypes present).
validation_claims.check_method: Audit youth_players counts per team after a rollover

validation_claims.claim: A full 63-game tournament runs in ~16.5 seconds (~0.26 s/game) on the reference dev machine.
Final-game scoring of 17–2 in test sims with avg 24.8 R/G is consistent with the pro league's documented 22–26 R/G/T target.
validation_claims.check_method: Re-sim youth games and compare run environment

non_actions.item: Relegation playoff is not a real game sim (win-pct-weighted Bernoulli draw with 0.4–0.6 floor/ceiling)
non_actions.reason: the playoff happens at off-season time when the engine isn't running, and the user explicitly said the auction part isn't important right now

non_actions.item: No stratified talent at initial tier seed (talent-blind draw)
non_actions.reason: The user opted out of stratified talent at seed time
The user mentioned rivalries in the abstract but didn't ask for them

non_actions.item: No per-PA youth stats (originally heuristic game results only)
non_actions.reason: would have at least doubled the schema surface for marginal narrative gain
For v1 the random draw is fine — every season produces a different bracket shape, and a pot system is a small follow-up

non_actions.item: No carry-over performance feedback into youth development
non_actions.reason: This was the simplest defensible cut for the demo

non_actions.item: No human bidding in the auction
non_actions.reason: This is a sim, not a UI auction room. AI valuations resolve everything.

non_actions.item: One bid per player per team (no multi-round escalation)
non_actions.reason: The noise term is what produces variance between teams, not back-and-forth bidding

non_actions.item: Keepers chosen by raw overall only
non_actions.reason: The ranked top-N is plenty for the demo

non_actions.item: Geographic / pot-based group draw for the youth tournament

non_actions.reason: A player who carries a tournament gets the same dev draw as the bench.

non_actions.item: Auction visualisation as a live event
non_actions.reason: Currently the report is a static page after the auction runs.
A real IPL has different rules per franchise / season; we treat all teams identically. Could be a config knob.

residual_risks: Known regression: any youth player from a save pre-dating the YPI commit has youth_potential_index = 1.0, so their existing tournament stats reflect full potential rather than YPI-muted potential; retroactive fix requires a re-roll.
~30% of the auction pool goes unsold (long tail of ~700 replacement-level players) — described as a feature, not a bug.
Cost of separate youth tables: every read endpoint that wants to show youth data has to query both tables (kept localised to youth.py).
open_hooks: The hook in _decide_playoff_match is one function — swap it for a real game sim later if desired.
Pot-based seeding for youth group draw as a small follow-up.
Feed tournament line into a _grit_modulator-style multiplier on the dev draw for performance-based youth development.
Animated bid-by-bid auction replay — the data is all in auction_results.
Dynamic keeper rules per tier as a config knob.
section_headers_original: After-Action Report — Tiered league + Youth league + IPL auction
Part 3 — IPL-style auction with Vickrey resolution
Architectural decisions that propagated through everything
Separate tables for the youth league
The tiered config is a new config, not a fork of the existing schedule logic
Auction runs on the *teams* schema, not a separate "auction roster" schema
Phase 4 — Youth roster overhaul: jokers, YPI governor, recruiting stars, hidden ratings
Phase 3 — Real game sim for the youth tournament (post-AAR addition)
Manager AI on a roster that has no archetype data
unmapped_content: Bid valuation formula: base_value = overall × 5; need_multiplier = 1.0 + 0.15 × position_need (capped at 1.5); noise = uniform(0.85, 1.15); max_bid = floor(base × need_mult × noise); purse_cap = max(10, purse_remaining - 10 × (slots_left - 1)); final_bid = min(max_bid, purse_cap). YPI: per-player access factor in [0.22, 0.81] rolled once at creation; stored attributes are TRUE potential; engine multiplies unit-space ratings by YPI; YPI never persists into the pro players table. Recruiting star distribution: 5★ 0.7% (composite ≥ 68), 4★ 9% (≥ 58), 3★ 30% (≥ 48), 2★ 47% (≥ 36), 1★ 13%. AVG ladder by stars: 5★ .333, 4★ .340, 3★ .303, 2★ .273, 1★ .228. Roster shape: 8 starting fielders + 8 backups + 9 pitchers (3 rotation + 6 bullpen) + 3 jokers = 28 per team × 32 nations = 896. Youth SP rotation: ORDER BY starts_so_far ASC, pitcher_skill DESC, id ASC. Phase-3 note that mgr defaults were 0.5/archetype="" and joker decisions short-circuited (superseded by Phase 4). Commits: d6d10ac, 10a2b62, 293153d, 4d187fb; branch claude/new-league-structure-tqk8H. Full NEW/MODIFIED file list in 'Files added / modified'.
parser_notes: Long multi-phase AAR covering four phases including a 'post-AAR addition' (Phase 3) and Phase 4 appended after the original report; Phase 4 section appears before Phase 3 in the document. Date taken from 'Date completed: 2026-05-08' header line.
